mechanics.excerpt: Victor arrived New Avalon to the disturbing news that Joshua Marik was dying leukemia: despite the best efforts of the NAIS to save him The Federated Commonwealth still des perately needed war materiel that only the Free Worlds League could provide _ Victor could not afford t0 lose the only hold he had over Thomas Marik: After consulting with his senior advis: ers_ Victor replaced the dying child with double_ Marik_ how- ever, had suspicions_ generation ago_ the Capellan Confederation had nearly succeeded replacing Hanse Davion with double; ensure the survival of his nation, Marik belleved_ Victor Davion might attempt the same trick_ Marik tOOk 183
